# Sohrab Zia

> Product designer in Kuwait with 14+ years across web and mobile, combining product thinking, UI/UX craft, and front-end implementation.

## Positioning

Sohrab Zia is a Product Designer who works close to implementation. His work spans product thinking, information architecture, user flows, interface design, prototyping, design systems, responsive web design, and front-end implementation.

- Role: Product Designer
- Location: Kuwait
- Experience: 14+ years across web and mobile
- Differentiator: Product design craft supported by hands-on front-end fluency
- Current employer: Diyar United Company
- Current title: Web / Graphic Designer
- Current tenure: June 2015 to Present

## Flagship case study: Hayakom

Hayakom is the official Kuwait Public Authority for Sport app and Sohrab's flagship product design case study.

- Role: Lead Product Designer
- Challenge: Unify live sports, scheduled events, tickets, teams, players, offers, and tourism in one bilingual mobile product
- Scope: Discovery architecture, live match and event flows, Arabic and English RTL/LTR design, reusable components, and design handoff
- Key decisions: Prioritize live and upcoming content by time; create reusable match and event states; keep booking and tourism connected without competing with core sports discovery
- Shipped: Home and discovery, fixtures, match details, team and player views, ticket entry points, bilingual layouts, and a reusable visual system
- Outcome: One coherent official app that can receive regular content updates across Kuwait's national sports and cultural calendar

## Core skills

- Design: UI/UX Design, Figma, Adobe Creative Suite, Responsive Web Design
- Front end: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, jQuery
- Platforms: SharePoint, Microsoft Power Apps, Visual Studio, Microsoft Office
